reviews.comment:
Los bańos impecables como siempre el aca y muy buena atención. Un detalle para resaltar que el agua para cargar el tema es gratis cuando me han llegado a pedir hasta 100 para cargarlo

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms were spotless as always here, and the service was excellent. One detail worth noting is that the water for charging the device is free, whereas I've been charged up to 100 pesos before.

reviews.comment:
IMPRECINDIBLE COMBATIR LAS MOSCAS UN ASCO ESTAR AHI SENTADO CON TANTOS BICHOS MOLESTANDO, DESPUES MUY MALO EL CAFE CON LECHE Y LAS MEDIALUNAS, NUNCA MAS AHI IREMOS A LA SHELL DE AL LADO, ESE "ACA" SE QUEDO EN TIEMPO HAY MUCHISIMAS MEJORES OPCIONES.

(Translated by Google)
It's essential to combat the flies. It's disgusting sitting there with so many bugs bothering you. The coffee and croissants were also terrible. We'll never go there again; we'll go to the Shell next door. That "here" is outdated; there are many better options.
